siteDescription: News aggregator site that tracks information on layoffs and surrounding fields such as resumes, interview tips, and career advice. Content updates twice daily at 7am and 7pm. The site has filter buttons (All, News, Video) and topic filters (Interview Tips, Resume Writing, ATS, Layoffs, AI, Job Search, Career Advice, Unemployment). The Analytics page contains AI-generated content that changes frequently - test structure, not specific content.

importantTests.name: Analytics Top Companies Filter Count Verification
importantTests.description: On the analytics page, the 'Top Companies Mentioned' section contains clickable filters. Each filter shows a company name with a mention count (e.g., 'Apple 8 mentions' or 'Microsoft 5 mentions'). When a filter is clicked, the number of articles displayed should match the count shown on the filter. For example, if a filter says 'Apple 8 mentions', clicking it should display exactly 8 articles.

importantTests.name: Navigation Links Functionality
importantTests.description: Test that all navigation links (Current, Archive, Analytics, About) work correctly and navigate to their respective pages

importantTests.name: Content Type Filter Buttons
importantTests.description: Test that content type filter buttons (All, News, Video) function correctly and update the feed appropriately

importantTests.name: Topic Filter Buttons
importantTests.description: Test that topic filter buttons (Interview Tips, Resume Writing, ATS, Layoffs, AI, Job Search, Career Advice, Unemployment) work correctly and filter content appropriately

importantTests.name: Feed Structure and Loading
importantTests.description: Verify that feed structure loads correctly and displays content without errors

importantTests.name: Current Page Small View
importantTests.description: Verify that the Current page shows a small current view of latest items

importantTests.name: Archive Page Last 500 Items
importantTests.description: Verify that the Archive page shows the last 500 items in a historical feed

importantTests.name: Analytics Page Structure
importantTests.description: Verify that Analytics page sections exist and structure is correct. Do NOT test specific content (trending topics, company names, statistics) as these are AI-generated and change frequently

importantTests.name: Filter Combinations
importantTests.description: Test that content type filters and topic filters can be combined and work correctly together

importantTests.name: Page Load Times and Responsiveness
importantTests.description: Test that pages load within reasonable time and are responsive

testingNotes: Test functionality, filters, and structure. Do NOT test specific content that changes with scheduled updates (article titles, video titles, exact article counts) or AI generation (Analytics trending topics, company names, statistics). Feeds update twice daily - content will vary between runs.
